actions.value:
To export your transactions from Edge for any crypto asset:

 

1) Login to your Edge account

2) Go to "View Assets" or tap the wallet symbol located near the bottom

3) Tap into the specific wallet you want to create a report for

4) Tap the three vertical dots (⋮) to open this asset's menu

5) Find the option for 'Export Transactions'

6) Select the Date Range and format (Quickbooks QBO, CSV or Bitwave CSV)

7) Tap the Export button

8) Now from your phone's interface, select the preferred method for sharing or sending the file to yourself, your accountant, etc.

 

To learn more: https://edge.app/blog/tips-and-tutorials/csv-crypto-export

Let us know if you have any other questions!

To export your transactions from Edge for any crypto asset:
 
1) Login to your Edge account
2) Go to "View Assets" or tap the wallet symbol located near the bottom
3) Tap into the specific wallet you want to create a report for
4) Tap the three vertical dots (⋮) to open this asset's menu
5) Find the option for 'Export Transactions'
6) Select the Date Range and format (Quickbooks QBO, CSV or Bitwave CSV)
7) Tap the Export button
8) Now from your phone's interface, select the preferred method for sharing or sending the file to yourself, your accountant, etc.
 
To learn more: https://edge.app/blog/tips-and-tutorials/csv-crypto-export
Let us know if you have any other questions!
